title: We Cant Fight The Fed We Cant Listen To It Either Welcome To The Old Normal
section_path: We Cant Fight The Fed We Cant Listen To It Either Welcome To The Old Normal
section_path_text: We Cant Fight The Fed We Cant Listen To It Either Welcome To The Old Normal
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week:
The Fed surprised markets by performing a double cut while being optimistic about inflation. This optimism was not echoed by other central banks. It will have a limited impact on the economy but it has significant implications for investors, who can now stop monitoring the Fed's comments (unless they are very important) in between meetings.
